The '''G2-GS''' was an industrial [[Beamdrill/Legends|beamdrill]] manufactured by [[Karflo Corporation/Legends|Karflo Corporation]]. It was a modified [[G2-GE beamdrill/Legends|G2-GE beamdrill]] that sported a [[Life support/Legends|life support]] bubble and small [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]] for use in [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]].<ref name="EGWT" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-11-XX -->''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
